content: Hey, I'm so excited to start learning Mandarin. I've always been fascinated by the language and culture.
That's great to hear! Learning a new language can be so rewarding. What motivated you to start learning Mandarin?
I'm actually planning to move to Brazil next year, and I want to be able to communicate with the locals. I've heard that knowing some Mandarin can be helpful in certain business situations.
That's a good point. Mandarin is a widely spoken language, and knowing it can definitely be an asset. Have you started taking classes or using any language learning apps?
Yeah, I've been using Duolingo and taking classes at a local language school. It's been challenging, but I'm enjoying the process of learning.
That's great! Duolingo is a fantastic resource for language learning. What do you like to do in your free time, Ezra?
I'm a paramedic, so I don't have a lot of free time, but when I do, I love to work on my mechanical keyboards. I've built a few custom keyboards, and it's a great way to relax.
That's really cool! Mechanical keyboards can be so much fun to work with. Do you have any pets?
Yeah, I have a cat named Max, and he's a little ball of energy. I've been thinking about getting a dog, but I'm not sure if I have the time to care for one.
That's understandable. Pets can be a big responsibility, but they can also bring so much joy to our lives. What kind of dog were you thinking of getting?

I've always been a fan of bulldogs, they're such gentle and affectionate dogs. But I've also been considering adopting a rescue dog, there are so many great organizations out there that need our support.
That's a great idea! Adopting a rescue dog can be such a rewarding experience. Have you been to any good aquariums or zoos recently?
Actually, I just visited the Monterey Bay Aquarium, and it was amazing. I saw so many incredible sea creatures, and it was great to learn about all the conservation efforts they're doing.
That sounds like a great experience! The Monterey Bay Aquarium is definitely one of the best in the country. What did you think of the sea otters?
Oh, they were adorable! I could watch them play for hours. I've also been getting into stand-up comedy lately, and I've been trying to make it to as many shows as I can.
That's great! Stand-up comedy can be such a fun and entertaining way to spend an evening. Have you seen any good comedians recently?
Yeah, I just saw a great show at the Comedy Cellar, and it was hilarious. The comedian was talking about his experiences as a paramedic, and it had me laughing out loud.
That sounds like a great time! I'm glad you enjoyed the show. Do you have any favorite board games or hobbies?
I'm actually a big fan of board games, and I love playing Scrabble and chess. I've also been getting into pottery lately, and it's been a great way to relax and be creative.
That's really cool! Pottery can be such a fun and rewarding hobby. Have you made any pieces that you're particularly proud of?
Yeah, I just made a beautiful vase that I'm really proud of. It was a lot of work, but it was worth it in the end.
That sounds amazing! I'm sure it's a beautiful piece. It was great chatting with you, Ezra!
Likewise, it was great talking to you too! I should get back to my language studies, but it was nice taking a break and chatting about my hobbies and interests.
